title: Potato Wedges
text: Crispy potato wedges, perfectly seasoned and served with our chef's special sauce.

title: Crunchy Chicken Toast
text: Two slices of toast with mozzarella, chicken, mushroom, and a fresh cream sauce.

title: London Fish & Chips
text: Marinated dori fish with french fries and a fresh garden salad, served with tartar sauce.

title: Garlic Mushroom
text: Button mushrooms sauteed with chopped garlic and spices, served with a savory soya sauce.

title: Chicken Nachos
text: In-house made nachos with spicy minced chicken, aromatic vegetables, cheese, and salsa.

title: Cream of Mushroom Soup
text: A rich and creamy mushroom stock with cream sauce and green oil, served with garlic bread.

title: Thai & Thick Soup
text: A flavorful and spicy Thai soup with chicken, prawn, mushroom, and lemon grass.

title: Chicken Scallopini
text: Tender slice of chicken cooked in a creamy sauce, served with potato and vegetables.

title: Bango Stuffed Chicken
text: Marinated chicken stuffed with cheese and mushroom, with sauteed vegetables.

title: Chicken BBQ
text: Juicy marinated BBQ chicken served with a fresh garden salad and butter rice.

title: Sirloin Steak
text: A perfectly marinated sirloin steak served with mashed potato and sauteed vegetables.

title: Seafood Fried Rice
text: A delicious mix of gourmet seafood and vegetables in fried rice with our chef's special sauce.

title: Norwegian Salmon Steak
text: Imported Norwegian salmon with mashed potato and sauteed vegetables in a lemon butter sauce.

title: Grill Koral Fish
text: Marinated whole koral fish, grilled and served with vegetables and lemon butter sauce.

title: Beef Shawarma
text: Tender marinated beef, local lettuce, and pickles wrapped and served with special sauce.

title: Chicken Shawarma
text: Marinated fried chicken, local lettuce, and pickles wrapped and served with special sauce.

title: Chicken Fajita Pizza
text: Toasted pizza topped with spicy chicken, onion, black olives, capsicum, and cheese.

title: Beef Bolognese Gourmet Pizza
text: Gourmet pizza with minced beef, napolitano sauce, onion, black olives, and jalapeno.

title: Ginger Citrus Mocktail
text: A refreshing and zesty mocktail with a perfect blend of ginger and citrus flavors.

title: Sunrise Mocktail
text: A beautiful and delicious mocktail, perfect for a bright and sunny day.
